programme.title: Gypsy Rose: Life After Lock Up
programme.desc: Series following Gypsy-Rose Blanchard after her release from prison. With her divorce from Ryan ongoing, prepping for the baby, and Ken's upcoming house move, Gypsy's stressed.

programme.title: Gypsy Rose: Life After Lock Up
programme.desc: Despite the daily online hate she's receiving, Gypsy accepts a public speaking engagement at a university. But after an initial warm reception, more social media trolls get to her.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon revisits three restaurants - Handlebar, Casa Roma and The Black Pearl - to check in with the owners he helped. Has his advice been put to good use.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: Sunday Brunch

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Beckett has been shot and fights for her life in hospital while Castle tries to track down the hit man responsible.
